title: The Braggart
content:
Petrolio, vaunting his Mercedes' power,
 Vows she can cover eighty miles an hour.
 I tried the car of old and know she can.
 But dare he ever make her? Ask his man!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Rudyard Kipling, titled "The Braggart", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
